test.observation: Jest ran 22 suites / 180 tests and all passed. Output still included agent-store and agent-init console logging plus the expected wallet-connect error-path console.error exercised by tests.

typecheck.observation: tsc --noEmit completed successfully with no TypeScript diagnostics.

lint.observation: ESLint exited 0, but reported 20 warnings: pre-existing no-bitwise/no-regex-spaces warnings plus several no-unused-disable warnings in tests and agent-store.

blockingIssues.description: src/lib/enbox/biometric-vault.ts initialize() provisions the native secret and then immediately calls NativeBiometricVault.getSecret(), violating VAL-VAULT-001's no-prompt setup path; if that extra prompt fails or is canceled, the catch path deletes the freshly created secret.

src/lib/enbox/agent-store.ts still calls agent.initialize({ password: '' }) and agent.start({ password: '' }), so the store layer did not actually remove password-shaped agent calls required by the biometric-only integration contract.
useAgentStore.reset() does not wipe persistent ENBOX_AGENT LevelDB state, so reset leaves prior wallet data behind instead of returning the app to a clean post-reset state.

The no-vault reset fallback deletes the native secret and resets session state but does not clear the persisted enbox.vault.initialized flag, which can misroute the next launch away from clean onboarding.

src/hooks/use-auto-lock.ts still depends on AUTO_LOCK_TIMEOUT_MS and only calls session.lock(); it does not tear down the agent or add hook coverage for teardown-on-background, so the feature's claimed VAL-VAULT-020/021 assertions remain unmet.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Tighten the skill's procedure-honesty gate so workers must record deviations whenever implementation starts before failing tests or required mission-library reads, and consider transcript-backed validation before accepting `followedProcedure: true`.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review reports for biometric-identity-vault-class, agent-init-and-store-integration, vault-lifecycle-recovery-and-migration, and auto-lock-vault-primitives all cite transcript evidence that implementation started before new tests were created or run; one review also noted skipped required library/environment reads during a test-running session.

rejectedObservations.observation: Mission feature metadata says auto-lock-vault-primitives only pins primitives, but its fulfills list claims hook-level VAL-VAULT-020/021 assertions.
rejectedObservations.reason: Mission-specific metadata mismatch; this is not an additive services.yaml/library/AGENTS.md/skill update to apply from scrutiny synthesis.

rejectedObservations.observation: Three additional review reports repeated the same followedProcedure/shared-state concern raised by the synthesized skill recommendation.
rejectedObservations.reason: Duplicate of the systemic mobile-feature-worker skill recommendation above.
